extension.description: [B][COLOR yellow]BETA/DEV VERSION[/COLOR][/B][CR]High-performance, hardened VPN manager for LibreELEC. Now supports multiple providers including NordVPN (NordLynx), Private Internet Access (PIA), and Custom manual configurations. Features an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops and secure DNS hardening.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] Designed specifically for LibreELEC. [CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• Multi-Provider Support (Nord, PIA, Custom)[CR]• Pure Python WireGuard Handshake logic[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Reconnect[CR]• Hardened DNS & IPv6 Leak Protection[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official product of any VPN provider. Use at your own risk.
extension.news: v1.0.0.101 - Major Feature: Multi-Provider Architecture (NordVPN, PIA, Custom). - New Module: Private Internet Access (PIA) with dynamic WireGuard handshake. - New Module: Custom Provider support for manual .config file imports. - Fine tuned Raspberry Pi 5 with high-speed network timings. - Added hardware detection for separate Pi 4 and Pi 5 configurations. - Fixed VPN reconnect loops by optimizing WATCHDOG_SETTLE_DELAY. - Implemented "Silent Reconnect" for background VPN switching during streams. - Added blackout "Grace Period" to prevent false network alerts. - Smart Country Selector: Replaced manual ID entry with a live API-driven multi-select dialog. - Core: Standardized temporary state files to /tmp for improved reliability. - Fix: Enhanced Auto-Mapper to correctly distinguish between manual and automated sessions. - Fix: Space-safe Service ID (SID) detection for complex VPN server names.
